entry.title: Re: Adhoc notifications triggered manually not received b...
entry.content: KBA 2328647 worked perfectly and resolved my issue. Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Guidance Required on Enabling DTO for ADSOs with Non-...
entry.content: Hi Roland, Agreed .For the ADSO with cube type or Datamart ADSO we can use any IOBJs for partition. What if the ADSO is of standard type where the time char is in Data field folder and we have to partition based on time char only as per requirement where the ADOS already holds data in it for many years. Thanks, Shyamala.

entry.title: Example of a HANA Hierarchy Query for Incentive Management Positions
entry.content:
I'm trying to create a HANA query that takes the highest position and generates a hierarchy tree based on the Incentive Management TrueComp CS_POSITION table.
I've tried a couple of different ways according to what I've read in the SAP_HANA_Hierarchy_Developer_Guide but can't get them to work.
Does anyone happen to have an example of what I'm looking for?

Thanks in advance!
Ron

entry.title: Re: Recommended approach for Fiori Adapt UI in S/4H On-Pr...
entry.content:
@Jocelyn_Dart. Is there step by step guide on how to publish Adapt UI change from unit test client to development client.
We try to add published version to transport in unit test client and got this error "Sorry, your UI changes cannot be transported at this time. Please try again later or contact your administrator: Error"

entry.title: Re: Understanding Joule - (Step #8) Joule for Consultants
entry.content:
@Raja_Gupta1  -  Thank you for the most awaited post.

Could you please clarify how consultants access “Joule for Consultants” now that it is available as an independent SaaS offering?

  • Dedicated portal: Does using it as SaaS require consultants to log in through a separate Joule portal or workspace, entirely outside the individual SAP solutions?
  • In-app access: If Joule is also activated inside the relevant SAP clouds (e.g., S/4HANA Public Cloud, CX, SuccessFactors), can consultants still open the same “Joule for Consultant” features directly from within those systems? 
  • While the pricing model mentions 35 AI Units per user, the billing also refers to 22,900 requests.
    Does this mean that the 22,900 requests are pooled and can be shared across multiple users?
    Or is it strictly tied to individual user licenses—i.e., each user must have their own 35 AI Units, regardless of how many requests are actually made?

Looking forward your response!!

Thank You Much

entry.title: Re: Confirm Popup with Standard Text (SO10)
entry.content:
You might want to look at function module POPUP_DISPLAY_TEXT_USER_BUTTON .

This uses Dialog Texts (SE61) to define extensive text information with the usual formatting. This functionality also offers the option to define placeholders and insert parameter values at runtime.

If you must use store your text information in SO10, I believe the SAPscript  .INCLUDE command, referencing the standard text by keys, will work in a dialog text.

entry.title: Re: Guidance Required on Enabling DTO for ADSOs with Non-...
entry.content:
You can choose any key field (not just time characteristics) for partitioning. Then the data can be put to the COLD store based on the partitions.

If you want to partition this ADSO based on a time characteristic, then you have to put a time characteristic / field to the keys.

entry.title: PO Output form gets overwritten when PO is changed
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have got an interesting request from customer as below:

Whenever a PO is changed (say qty,value etc), the previous PO output is overwritten and only one PO form is available with new values. Now, he wants that the previous form to also be available for audit purpose. Is this possible that if a PO is changed say 3 times, then in Print Preview button, we can have option to download any of the versions of PO?

 

thanks,

Wasel

entry.title: Re: Resource type in Operation Activity in SAP DMC (Publi...
entry.content:
Hi, see some comments below:

  1. "000000" represents the Routing Sequence from ERP. From public Cloud it comes as 6 digit, from On-Prem as a single digit.
  2. Resource Type is set as "DEFAULT" by default and can be set differently via custom XSLT in Manage Integration Workflows app for S/4H Private Cloud only, where SAP Integration Suite is used. For S/4H Public Cloud, as SAP Integration Suite is not used, this is currently not possible.
  3. Master Routings can be used for enrichment, see Enrichment of Order-Specific Objects which also applies for public cloud, where some specific assignments and flags defined at the master routing level are copied over to the order-specific routing during order download.

Hope it helps, Manoel

entry.title: HRSUP function - difference between the gross up value and tax and NI (GB Payroll)
entry.content:
Hi, 

For our employees on a salary free of tax deal, the total of tax and NI should equal the free of tax gross up value.  The gross up value is sometimes showing as a higher value, meaning the employee is paid more net pay that agreed.

We have not checked previous years yet but can see that it is affecting the 24/25 tax year.

 

For one employee in particular, there has not been a backdated change from non free of tax salary to free of tax salary - we understand in this instance there could be a difference.  Their tax code has also remained the same.

The only thing which has changed for this employee is the net pay value agreed by the employer

 

Has their been an issue with the gross up function where a fix should have been applied?

entry.title: Re: Project Glow: New Design Coming to SAP Community on Monday, June 2
entry.content: @Marian_Zeis Thank you! I have forwarded internally.

entry.title: Roth limits for Employee Contributions
entry.content:
Hello,

I know that the limits for 401K/pre-tax savings plans are provided by SAP annually (updates T511P table). Can anyone share their system set up to limit employee contributions for Roth (after tax) plans?? I've set the plans up for IT0169, but the system is allowing contributions over the 2025 limits. Did you all use limit on deductions through IMG, Badi, or some other way?

entry.title: Re: PO Output form gets overwritten when PO is changed
entry.content: From the menu, select 'Goto', then 'Messages', and then double-click on the required output.

entry.title: Re: SAP TechEd 2025: Registration is live – check out our brand new hybrid experience!
entry.content: Cannot be more excited to see everyone online and in person!!!  And @TammyPowlas let's make a local event happen in our mid-atlantic area, even if just a meetup with drinks!

entry.title: Create System on SAP BTP
entry.content:
I created a Trial account in SAP BTP, my idea is to be able to create an AddOn as a POC, I created a subaccount and ran the "Prepare an Account for ABAP Trial" Booster, the next step would be to Create System in the subaccount instance, but I can't find how to do this, I understand that it is necessary, because it will send me the email with the access link to the ABAP system.
Can you help me with this?

entry.title: Re: Dynamic Reference Type in Message Mapping in SAP Cloud Integration
entry.content:
HI SamikshyaThakur09,

Thanks for the update. 

Infact today only i made use of this XSLT dynamic ( Source as header ) option and made it work. I pass the mapping name externally.  One observation is that.. you need to pass the entire resource path in the mapping reference ex : "/mapping/<XSLT filename with extension as .XSL>"

Also even groovy, there is a way to call it dynamically as per the below blog, we can extract the content of the groovy script ( should be stored as resource in iflow ) as below and pass it to the iflow

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/access-cpi-resources-in-groovy-script/qaq-p/11906603

And execute the passed groovy dynamically using the technique as in blog below,

Rapid Groovy Scripting in CPI: Dynamic Loading and... - SAP Community

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message

Message processData(Message message) {

    def reader = message.getBody(Reader)
    Script script = new GroovyShell().parse(reader)
    
    message = script.processData(message)
    return message
}

Regards,

Rajesh Kumar T

entry.title: Re: Receive supplier invoices from authorities' platform and send them to different automation solut
entry.content:
Hi @UT ,
The button layout within edoc_cockpit is controlled by EDOPROCFUNCASGV view. INCOM_AUTO(Create incoming Invoice) button specific entry will be delivered by NOTE_3279255. Can you check whether the note is implemented and all manual steps were executed?

entry.title: Re: Guidance Required on Enabling DTO for ADSOs with Non-...
entry.content: Hi, do we need to do any activity for the existing data in adso after i make time char as a key field. As in production right now i have millions of records for each adso.

entry.title: Successfactors - create job to run Importing Matrix and Custom Managers
entry.content:
Hi experts,

Using the "Importing Matrix and Custom Managers" transaction, we disable the matrix manager relationships from being displayed in the org chart. However, every time a personal data change is sent from SAP to SuccessFactors, this deactivation is overridden, and the transaction must be executed again.
Is it possible to create a job that automatically performs this transaction?
Thank you.

M.

entry.title: Re: Project Glow: New Design Coming to SAP Community on Monday, June 2
entry.content:
@xavierlegarrec I have added both to the feedback list now. 

1. Content Filter for SAP Managed Tag pages
2. User profile filter

entry.title: Re: Guidance Required on Enabling DTO for ADSOs with Non-...
entry.content:
You would need to run the remodeling after you do the changes to the keys and partitions. See the document: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BW4HANA/107a6e8a38b74ede94c833ca3b7b6f51/53054b5f721149c19136e71e30d44dab.html?locale=en-US

Additionally check these Notes as well:

3304247 Optimized Repartitioning of DataStore Objects in a Remodeling Run
2374652 Handling Very Large Data Volumes in SAP BW/4HANA

entry.title: Create Event Reasons
entry.content:
Hello,

I would need to create a new event reason for Offboarding within the Employee Central module. I have set up the necessary event reason via the Manage Organization, Pay and Job Structures tool, but it does not appear in the picklist for the event reasons, when selecting "Offboard" in the employees' profile. Could you kindly advise on how to proceed for the newly created event reason become available for selection?

Best regards,
A.

entry.title: Re: Adding a custom field in Condition Contract condition...
entry.content: We found a BADI "WCB_DISPLAY_KONP_FIELDS_BADI" to enable the field to be displayed and edited in condition records of condition contract without having to add it in the condition table.

entry.title: Re: Getting error in SAP Integration Suite IFLOW - Unreso...
entry.content:
This still on going.. lets break down the issue like below

  • Do not connect any VPN.
  • In the postman, Directly call Token URL and pass the parameters.  Note: This postman trigger endpoint to Token URL only not the actual business endpoint URL.
    • Check what response is coming and validate CURL information from postman.
  • If above test is successfull, then replicate same token connection test from SAP CPI by passing same CURL information. with GET method.

Share the Token URL test results from Postman and also CPI.

Note: You are not calling actual endpoint. Only token URL from CPI and also Postman without any VPN connection.

I hope this will give clear difference .

entry.title: Can't connect to virtual IP using embacadero dbartisan 2016
entry.content:
I have a virtual ip sitting on 2 nodes. SAP installed on both nodes with binaries on each nodes and data files etc on a shared disk that fails over between both nodes. I am trying to connect through embacadero dbartisan 2016 to the virtual ip but am getting the following error.

15:12:26.540 DBMS ) ct_connect(): network packet layer: internal net library error: Net-Lib protocol driver call to connect two endpoints failed (08001)

I can connect to each node through embacadero dbartisan 2016 but can't connect to the Virtual ip. I have added the virtual IP to the sqlini file. Is there something else for this to be able to connect?

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud - Level Hierarchy - Help please
entry.content: I am just learning with sample data. I am trying both Geo enrichment without coordinates (United Sates, region, State. City) and also normal Level Hierarchy. The SAP help docs or the youtube videos instructions and my SAC trial version do not match. I think the help available do not match the help available. Can you please point me to any resource to learn the level-based hierarchy and Geo Enrichment with US Region, State and city (No Lat and Long). Thank you.

entry.title: What is planned for the 2508 release of SAP Variant Configuration and Pricing?
entry.content:
The 2508 release of SAP Variant Configuration and Pricing is planned to be deployed to BTP customer tenants on July 23, 2025:

Administration UI and Administration service:

Release

Test/Non-Productive & Productive Upgrades

2508

July 23, 2025

Variant Configuration service & Pricing service:

Release

Test/Non-productive Upgrade

Productive Upgrade

2508

July 23, 2025

August 13, 2025

 

This blog covers the following planned innovations:

  • Configuration and Pricing Services – L1 slide deck published
  • Configuration and Pricing Services – Root Certificate Change
  • Configuration and Pricing Services – Deprecation of /closeSession
  • Configuration and Pricing Services – Form for easy maintenance of X.509 certificates
  • Pricing service – Support for more standard pricing routines
  • Pricing service – Limit the size of engine traces
  • Variant Configuration service – Ability to set default values
  • Variant Configuration service – Persist user values involved in a conflict
  • Variant Configuration service – Mapping for AVC author type 7 (classification)
  • Administration – New version indicator in Getting Support

It also includes a call to act regarding the following changes:

  • Configuration and Pricing Services – Root Certificate Change
  • Configuration and Pricing Services – Deprecation of /closeSession

 

Please check the updated roadmap and release notes after the release date to see which of these features were delivered as planned.

 

Disclaimer

The information in this presentation is confidential and proprietary to SAP and may not be disclosed without the permission of SAP.
Except for your obligation to protect confidential information, this presentation is not subject to your license agreement or any other service or subscription agreement with SAP. SAP has no obligation to pursue any course of business outlined in this presentation or any related document, or to develop or release any functionality mentioned therein.

This presentation, or any related document and SAP's strategy and possible future developments, products and or platforms directions and functionality are all subject to change and may be changed by SAP at any time for any reason without notice. The information in this presentation is not a commitment, promise or legal obligation to deliver any material, code or functionality.  This presentation is provided without a warranty of any kind, either express or implied, including but not limited to, the implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, or non-infringement. This presentation is for informational purposes and may not be incorporated into a contract. SAP assumes no responsibility for errors or omissions in this presentation, except if such damages were caused by SAP’s intentional or gross negligence.

All forward-looking statements are subject to various risks and uncertainties that could cause actual results to differ materially from expectations. Readers are cautioned not to place undue reliance on these forward-looking statements, which speak only as of their dates,
and they should not be relied upon in making purchasing decisions.

 

Configuration and Pricing Services – L1 slide deck published

A L1 solution overview presentation was published here: https://d.dam.sap.com/a/SEYWspE?rc=10&doi=SAP1213697

It will also be available soon for partners on Content Discovery: https://content-discovery.int.sap/view/f118f516-8b8c-4a7e-82f6-20a5ef5370af#subview-1d11f13d-f1cc-48de-80e0-a07a46701964

 

Configuration and Pricing Services – Root Certificate Change

The root certificates on SAP BTP will be updated at the beginning of July. For more details and the timelines see the SAP Note 3566727. See also SAP BTP Cloud Foundry: switching to higher securit... - SAP Community.

Action: Calls to configuration and pricing services
This is a breaking change for calling the configuration and pricing services. Please verify whether your landscape, from which SAP Variant Configuration and Pricing is called, is already supporting the new root certificate, especially if you are using custom integrations. This is due until the dates mentioned in the SAP Note 3566727.  

Action: Data replication with SAP HANA smart data integration (SDI)
On HANA Cloud, a cross-signed certificate which supports the old and new one will be used during a transition period until end of 2025. Please upgrade the SDI DP Agent to version 2.8.0.2 or higher or follow the workaround of the SAP Note 3617329. This is due until the end of 2025.
All SAP Enterprise Cloud Services (ECS) / RISE customers have been informed via a top issue. Those actions are also due until the end of 2025. See also the SAP Note 3622538.

 

Configuration and Pricing Services – Deprecation of /closeSession

The endpoints POST /closeSession of the configuration and pricing services used to be used to remove configurations and pricing documents from the HTTP session. This is no longer required because of improved resource management.

The endpoints were set to be deprecated and will be removed with the release 2605.

Action: If called from your application, remove those calls before the May release next year (2026).

More information was published with the 2025 May release in the API Definition of the Pricing service and the Variant Configuration service and in the Development Guide (Pre-Production).

 

Configuration and Pricing Services – Form for easy maintenance of X.509 certificates

As announced here, in the meantime, it is possible to use X.590 certificates to request OAuth Bearer tokens for calling the configuration and pricing services.

When creating a new service key or service binding, an external or self-managed certificate can be imported by including it as part of the JSON binding parameters.

To ease the maintenance, we will introduce a second dialog where you can paste your copied certificate into a field in a form instead of having to maintain the parameters in JSON format:

Form

 

More information was published with the February release in the Security Guide (Pre-Production) and the Administration Guide (Pre-Production).

 

Pricing service – Support for more standard pricing routines

Newly supported standard requirement formulas:

Formula Number

Formula Name

Description

11

No Material

Returns true, if material number (KOMP-MATNR) is empty.

20

Price Charge

Returns true, if condition exclusion flag (KOMP-KZNEP) was set to X.

28

No Variant (SA)

Returns true, if cross-plant configurable material number (KOMP-SATNR) is empty.

29

No Exception 'N'

Returns true, if condition exclusion flag (KOMP-KZNEP) was not set to N.

30

No Exclusion 'V'

Returns true, if condition exclusion flag (KOMP-KZNEP) was not set to V.

35

Plant info record

Returns true, if indicator to read info record conditions without plant (KOMP-NO017) is empty.

37

Variant

Returns true, if both material number (KOMP-MATNR) and cross-plant configurable material number (KOMP-SATNR) were specified, and both are different.

42

Pricing - Normal

Returns true, if pricing-relevance indicator (KOMP-PRSFD) is X.

57

Not Free Goods w/o return item

Returns true, if pricing-relevance indicator (KOMP-PRSFD) is X and condition exclusion flag (KOMP-KZNEP) is empty and item is not a return item (KOMP-SHKZG <> X).

 

Newly supported standard condition base value formulas:

Formula Number

Formula Name

Description

23

Preference

If the condition rate value is greater than or equal to 99,999,999,999 or less than zero, the calculation type is changed to B (Fixed Amount), the condition rate unit is set to the document currency unit, and the condition rate value is adjusted accordingly. Otherwise, no changes are made.

25

Cash Discount

Base value is set to 0 if the cash discount indicator (KOMP-SKTOF) has a value.

44

VAT France

Base value is set to the sum of net value and cash discount if the value of subtotal flag K is 1, otherwise, condition is made inactive with inactiveFlag ‘W’ and base value is set to 0.

61

Preference

When the condition rate value reaches or exceeds 99,999,999,999:

·         Calculation type changes to B (Fixed Amount).

·         Condition rate unit is set to the document currency unit.

·         Condition rate value is adjusted accordingly.

·         Subtotal flag 8 is set to the new condition rate value.

 

Otherwise:

·         Calculation type changes to C (Quantity).

·         Condition rate unit is set to the document currency unit.

·         Condition rate value is adjusted accordingly.

 

 

220

Gross value

Base value is set to the absolute value of subtotal flag E.

 

More information will be published in Supported Standard Pricing Exits (Pre-Production) with the August release.

 

Pricing service – Limit the size of engine traces

Several measures are in place to avoid that traces consume too many resources and risk the stability and reliability of the cloud service. For example, engine traces are only written when manually activated in the administration UI, but only for a certain time, and they are also deleted automatically after some time. If all traces are consuming too much memory on the database, tracing will be disabled automatically and can only be enabled again after deleting some traces manually.

With the August release, another protective measure will be introduced to limit the memory consumption of pricing traces for individual pricing requests: The new maximum size of a single trace will be around 5MB per item. That should be sufficient for most cases. If that limit is reached, a corresponding info message will be written to the trace file and the engine will stop writing further details to the pricing determination trace.

Engine Trace

 

SAP has the possibility to optimize those size limits for support cases and can furthermore limit the pricing determination trace to a list of relevant condition types.

More information about engine traces can be found in the Administration Guide (Pre-Production).

 

Variant Configuration service – Ability to set default values

When changing a characteristic value using the endpoints PATCH /configurations/{configurationId}/items/{itemId}/characteristics/{characteristicId} or PATCH /configurations/{configurationId}/items/{itemId}, the author User is used. That means that the characteristic value can be changed again by a user, but it cannot be overwritten or deleted by a rule. Trying to overwrite it from a rule would lead to an inconsistent configuration in the form of a conflict.

We will introduce the new input field author for the mentioned two PATCH APIs with two possible values: User and Default. When not specified, the author will be User as it used to be.

With author Default it will be possible to set so-called default values that can be changed by users and can be overwritten by VC rules.

Example request:

PATCH /configurations/3f1589b0-b372-412b-9235-c714485f0594/items/1

Body:

{
   "characteristics": [
      {
         "id": "PUMP_TYPE",
         "values": [
            {
               "value": "GEAR",
               "author": "User",
               "selected": true
            }
         ]
      },
      {
         "id": "RPM",
         "values": [
            {
               "value": 500.0,
               "author": "Default",
               "selected": true
            }
         ]
      },
      {
         "id": "FLOW_RATE",
         "values": [
            {
               "value": 195.0,
               "author": "Default",
               "selected": true
            }
         ]
      }
   ]
}

 

Restrictions: Setting default values via an API makes sense only in exceptional cases. It will not be possible when AVC Forwarding has been enabled. In this case, only user values can be set. It makes no sense either to do it if AVC is used in the back-end system, because all new S/4 interfaces to create sales documents are only considering the characteristics’ user values and are reprocessing the configuration in SAP S/4HANA based on those user values. That means that only with an order inbound interface that takes the full configuration results (including system and default values) without reprocessing the configuration, it makes sense to set defaults outside of VC rules via an API. With classic LO-VC this should be possible with old IDOC type ODERS05 and BAPI BAPI_SALESORDER_CREATEFROMDAT2 if SCE = 1 is set in the configuration header structure which should prevent re-processing the sent configuration through VC.

More information will be published in the API Definition and in the Development Guide (Pre-Production) with the August release.

 

Variant Configuration service – Persist user values involved in a conflict

Problematic scenario:

A rule has set the system value A for a characteristic, but a PATCH request sets the user value B, which causes a conflict.

A GET request right after the PATCH, against the same server instance, returns the configuration as expected with a conflict.

But a later GET request after a couple of minutes and/or a GET request that is served from a different server instance (if the caller did not send the session cookie) does NOT return the conflict.

The reason for this is that in the second case, the configuration must be reloaded from the database. The persisted configuration only contains the system value A - the conflicting user value B is lost.

This issue will be corrected with the August release.

 

Variant Configuration service – Mapping for AVC author type 7 (classification)

AVC introduced the new author 7 for characteristic values that have been set through classification. During AVC forwarding, this unknown author causes an error when processing AVC’s configuration results. This issue will be corrected with the August release.

 

Administration – New Version indicator in ‘Getting Support’

On the Getting Support screen you can find information about the software version of the administration UI used and the configuration and pricing services:

Support Info

 

As with this build information it is not easy to understand which software release is currently present in such a tenant, we will add additional information and name the release. That means with the deployment of the August release, the version 2508 will be shown for the services that are running on that version:

Support Info with Versions

 

More information will be published in the Administration Guide (Pre-Production) with the August release.

 

With that, you have a good overview of what innovations are planned for the August release. Please check the updated roadmap and release notes after the release date to see which of these features were delivered as planned.

entry.title: Re: Time Tracking Limitations and possible workarounds
entry.content: If you look in the Implementation Guide, you can search for Known Issue. These may include a workaround. Otherwise, you can search the SAP Notes/Knowledge Base articles but you would likely need to be looking for something specific.

entry.title: Period Close Error in Template Allocation CPTA run
entry.content:
Hi 
I need some help in sorting out an error saying that period is closed while doing template allocation  , even though OKP1 periods are open .

it says for transaction type RKLT  , the period is closed . but every transaction in OKP1 is open . 

 



your suggestion are highly appreciated .

Note : This is not in a live project environment, i'm doing it in a practice server . 

Thanks in Advance !!

entry.title: Re: Create just Purchase Requisition for Stock Material f...
entry.content:
Since you want to order a stock item "L" the material will be managed in Inventory Management for processing.  You need a reservation in order to process the eventual Goods Issue to the project.

For the Reservation only option you need MRP to fulfill the demand.

For the Res+PR you do not need MRP to generate the PR but you still need the reservation to manage the Goods Issue,  without the reservation you will have to manually track the inventory.

If you don't want to manage the inventory just use the Non-Stock option.

entry.title: Re: BTP Integration Suite sending api_key in outbound RES...
entry.content:
After converting to XML , how you are captring the api_key in the content modifier. 

Is your api key xml contains any name spaces.  Can you share the converted XML before Content modifier.

And also in the HTTP adapter , pass the api_key in the request header.

SAP Integration Suite

entry.title: Re: Special characters for projects - checkboxes not appearing 1909
entry.content:
Hello, i'm facing the same issue , Please does anyne have the solution for it ?

( As a side not : i'm having a new system (Sandbox) that got provided to us , maybe it will need any sort of obj activations ?  )

entry.title: Re: Roth limits for Employee Contributions
entry.content:
Did you already check documents such as 

  • 1657182 - Saving plan contribution limit for a highly compensated employee (HCE)
  • SAP help Limit on deduction 
  • 2604643 - Employer contribution limit as a flat amount is not correct in payroll

entry.title: Re: Error in help.sap.com for CPM Commercial Project Mana...
entry.content:
In SPRO it might be shown as Commercial Project.

Commercial Project Management -> Master Data -> Commercial Project -> Define Access Control

In CPM the very first config step is to set the term you wish to call the Master Project.  Under Define Custom Term there are 7 options for different industries.

entry.title: Re: How to find the custom ABAP artifacts in the SAP system using the SAP tables.
entry.content: @Prasenjitsbist Thanks for updating the formatting and adding the text.

entry.title: Re: Can someone help me with this question about SAP Sign...
entry.content:
Good day AaronANZ ,

Thank you for submitting your inquiry to the SAP Community.  Please see the attachment to review further insight into the inquiry you submitted.

Kind regards,

KantriceD

entry.title: Re: BTP Integration Suite sending api_key in outbound RES...
entry.content: Thank you Ramesh, simply adding * in the request header fixed the issue

entry.title: Re: Can someone help me with this question about SAP Sign...
entry.content: One answer is not related to the process execution, but rather to business policy or profitability, you have 5 seconds...

entry.title: send mail delayed
entry.content:
Hey Community!

Is there a way to send a mail to a specified time using CL_BCS?

I did not find any hint where to set a time when the mail should be sent.

Yes, I know, I can program a job that starts to that time and sends the mail, but I wonder if there is a built-in way for this.

Thanks for any hints

~Enno

entry.title: Metric Dashboard availability in SAP Cloud Logging
entry.content:
Hi,

One of my customers wants to know when the Metric Dashboard that was available in the Application Logging Service (which provides visibility into CPU and RAM utilization for each application instance) will be part of the Cloud Logging Service.

Any timelines or updates on this ?

Thanks,

entry.title: Getting 404 Not Found retrieving Image from on prem backend after deploying to Subaccount
entry.content:
I have developed  a Fiori App in BAS and when I run it in preview I can see the image :

however when I deploy it to BTP subaccount and run it there no images are showing, I receive error 'GET 404 Not Found'. The images are stored in an on prem S4/Hana system. 

The url that is failing is ....................s.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/sap/opu/odata/............SRV

 

The XS-APP.json is: 

{
  "welcomeFile": "/index.html",
  "authenticationMethod": "route",
  "routes": [
    {
      "source": "^/sap/(.*)$",
      "target": "/sap/$1",
      "destination": "rmdash_dest",
      "authenticationType": "xsuaa",
      "csrfProtection": false
    },
    {
      "source": "^/resources/(.*)$",
      "target": "/resources/$1",
      "authenticationType": "none",
      "destination": "ui5"
    },
    {
      "source": "^/test-resources/(.*)$",
      "target": "/test-resources/$1",
      "authenticationType": "none",
      "destination": "ui5"
    },
    {
      "source": "^(.*)$",
      "target": "$1",
      "service": "html5-apps-repo-rt",
      "authenticationType": "xsuaa"
    }
  ]
}
I've found a few posts but nothing that seems to be helpful for a Fiori template app.
 
Any help would be much appreciated.

entry.title: Latest Experience of PM the goal plan comments field is not displaying on the PM form PDF
entry.content:
Is this expected behavior?

I have this code in my goal plan:

<pdf-layout><![CDATA[${row.start} ${field.category} ${row.end} ${row.start} #if ($display.name) ${label.name}${field.name} #end #if ($display.metric) ${label.metric}${field.metric} #end #if ($display.weight) ${label.weight}${field.weight} #end #if ($display.start) ${label.start}${field.start} #end #if ($display.due) ${label.due}${field.due} #end #if ($display.desc) ${label.desc}${field.desc} #end #if ($display.state) ${label.state}${field.state} #end ${row.end} ${row.start} #if ($display.comments) ${label.comments}${field.comments} #end ${row.end} ${row.start} #if ($display.milestones) ${label.milestones}${field.milestones} #end ${row.end}]]></pdf-layout>

entry.title: Re: send mail delayed
entry.content: As far as I'm aware, this isn't something you can do with CL_BCS. You can easily submit a background delayed job, working with SOST/SCOT tables is risky and more difficult.

entry.title: Understanding the transition to Liquidity Calculation: G/L Classification.
entry.content:
With the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502, the deprecated app Define Default Liquidity Items for G/L Accounts is being replaced by the successor App Liquidity Calculation: G/L Classification .

Key Changes in Liquidity Calculation

  1. New Configuration Approach: The obsolete app previously defined configurations within the "Liquidity Calculation – Accounts with Assignment Information" table, used primarily for constructing flows. The new app introduces a simpler, more efficient approach for liquidity calculations. Switch to the new logic by selecting the "Activate" button on the toolbar of the App Liquidity Calculation: G/L Classification. After it’s activated, the activation button is invisible, and a message displays "You have activated the account data.".

  2. Migration Process: Transitioning to the new app involves converting existing configurations. By selecting the "Migrate" button, the program transfers the content from the "Liquidity Calculation - Accounts with Assignment Information" table to the structure of the successor app.

  3. Enhanced G/L Classification: Upon activation, the new logic reads account assignments, especially liquidity items, based on the Classification of G/L Accounts. Document chain tracing is impacted by these classifications, which determine whether a chain should continue or stop at a particular account.

G/L Account Classification

The classification process is crucial, relying on the following values:

  • Bank Account (1): The account is regarded as a bank account. When it is traced to, the chain stops on it. When it is the start item, the account assignments, including liquidity item, are replaced by further traced accounts.

  • Bank Clearing Account (2): The account is regarded as a bank clearing account. The chain does not stop if there's further clearing relationship. Account assignments are replaced by traced bank clearing accounts, intermediate accounts, or info accounts.

  • Intermediate Account (3): The account is regarded as an intermediate info account, generally a reconciliation account for customers/vendors. Similar to Bank Clearing Accounts, chains continue with further clearing relationships. Account assignments follow with traced intermediate accounts or info accounts.

  • Info Account (4): The account is regarded as an info account. This also a default value in G/L Classification. The chain stops on it. As a start item, the chain halts without any offset, finalizing account assignments including liquidity items.

  • Info Account with Chain (5): Regarded as an info account; chains continue if there's further clearing. All assignments except the liquidity item follow traced info accounts. If already assigned, the liquidity item is finalized. When liquidity items are not defined for info accounts, document chain tracing can derive meaningful liquidity items from further clearing relationships.

Steps to Update G/L Classification

For accurate determination of liquidity items, follow these steps:

  1. Use the job template Rebuild Liquidity Item in Accounting Document for the G/L Account defined in the Liquidity Calculation: G/L Classification.
  2.  Next, schedule the Flow Builder job template to rebuild the cash flow to read the updated liquidity item via document chain tracing.

In addition to the G/L Classification, the following conditions determine when G/L Accounts should be treated as Info Accounts.

Conditions when the G/L Account is treated as Info Accounts:-

  • Not Cash-Relevant G/L Account: Labeled as an Info Account when not marked as Cash-Relevant.
  • Profit and Loss (P&L) G/L Account: Generally considered an Info Account.
  • GR/IR Account: Typically processed as an Info Account.
  • Open Item Managed but Not Cash-Relevant G/L Account: Treated as an Info Account if not marked Cash-Relevant.
  • No Flow Type Assigned: Considered an Info Account if no Flow Type is assigned in accounting documents, but with derived meaningful liquidity items.
  • Tax Relevant Account: Typically handled as an Info Account.
  • Open Item Managed and Cash-Relevant G/L Account: Cash-Relevant accounts are processed differently, without being treated as Info Accounts.

 

Note:- When Default Liquidity Items are enabled in the configuration item Define Basic Settings for Liquidity Analysis, and the chain begins and ends on bank account items, the final liquidity item will be the default Incoming/Outgoing Cash Transfer.

For a better understanding of how liquidity items are traced in the document chain, it is advised to utilize the App Document Chain Tracing for Cash Flow 

References:- 

SAP Help Portal Liquidity Calculation: G/L Classification

SAP Help Portal Define Default Liquidity Items for G/L Accounts (Deprecated)

Also refer the pervious blog: Liquidity analysis in SAP S/4HANA Cloud

Hello,

The error was that i was entering the formula in the public view of the dimension, but it needed to be entered in the context on the model:

A silly error, but maybe it's useful for others in the future.

entry.title: Automate Job Info Portlet with Position to Job Info Synchronization in SAP SF Employee Central
entry.content:
Agenda

  1. Why Synchronization Position and Job Info fields? in SAP Successfactors Employee Central.
  2. How Synchronization works in SAP Successfactors Employee Central.
  3. How to configure Position → JobInfo sync using Business Rules in SAP Successfactors Employee Central.
  4. Pro-tips for error reduction and automation.
  5. Final thoughts.

Why Should Position and Job Info Be Synced?

  • In SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central, both Position and Job Information Portlets often hold overlapping data → like Department, Location, or Division. When these don’t match, confusion and manual errors occur.
  • By enabling Position-to-Job Info Synchronization , we allow Automatic Population of updated values from the position object into the employee’s job information portlet. It saves time and avoids discrepancies
  • Position and job information portlet Both should Match. Usually positions have tendency to Synchronize data to job information portlet. That means if you get 1 new update in position then those information can be automatically populated from Position job information portlet Info Via position to Job information Synchronization.
  • If you have different information on employee profile i .e job information portlet and on a position, how can you recognize the correct information?
  • So, You need to synced both Position and job information portlet data to avoid mismatch inofrmation to reduced the inconsistencey in the data. If you are not using Synchronization then you're losing automation as the data from the position is not matched with Job Information portlet.
  • In configuration using position management, only use Position-to-Job Info synchronization most commonly used the other Synchronization is a  little bit tricky and is not as much straight forward as this Positio-To-Job Information. I strongly recommend you to use Position to Job Information Synchronization in Manage Position management settings to reduce this data redundancy.

How Synchronization works:

  • Go to "Position Management Settings".
  • Navigate to the "Synchronization Tab".
    • The "Synchronization Tab" determines the behavior of the system when synchronizing data from a Position to an employee’s Job Information. This includes the rules for defining fields used in synchronization of Position to an employee’s Job Information.
  • Configure the fields that should sync
  • Add Business Rules for triggering updates (e.g., when a position is changed, reflect changes in Job Info).

How to configure Position → JobInfo sync using Business Rules in SAP SF EC:

To configure Position → JobInfo synchronization using Business Rules in SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central, follow this step-by-step guide, specifically using the "Synchronize Position Changes to Incumbents" scenario.

Step-by-Step: Position to JobInfo Sync Configuration with Business Rule:

Define the Use Case:

  • When a change happens in the Position object (like Department, Division, Location), it should automatically reflect in the employee's Job Information portlet.
  • This is handled via a Business Rule using the Scenario: Synchronize Position Changes to Incumbents.

Create the Business Rule:

  1. Go to Configure Business Rules.

  2. Click Create New Rule.

  3. Choose Position Management  - Pre Delivered Template. 

  4. Under Scenario, select: Synchronize Position Changes to Incumbents.

Register the Rule in Position Management Settings:

  1. Go to Admin Center → Position Management Settings.

  2. Navigate to the Synchronization Tab.

  3. Find the field: "Rule for Synchronizing Position to Job Information".

  4. Assign the Business Rule you just created (Sync_Position_To_JobInfo)

  5. Save the configuration.

Ensure Sync Triggers on Job Info Changes:

  • Also make sure:

    • If the position field is edited within Job Info, this rule should still trigger.

    • Use Position Code as a field in Job Information portlet.

    • Validate permissions and ensure the employee is tied to a valid position.

Pro-tips for error reduction and automation:

  • Use only the direction Position → JobInfo Synchronization.
  • Avoid two-way Synchronization i.e. Position → JobInfo Synchronization & JobInfo → Position Synchronization. to reduce data loops and overwrites.
  • "If you're not syncing the data then there is mandatory inconsistency between both Position & Job Information Portlet, you're missing automation."
  • Test in Preview or Staging before deploying to Production.
  • Clearly document synced fields to reduce confusion.

Final Thoughts on Position → Job Information Synchronization:

Synchronizing between Position to Job Information portlet is not just a technical configuration—it's a strategic step toward ensuring data integrity, process automation, and organizational consistency.

By automating this Synchronization:

  • You eliminate manual data entry and human errors.

  • Keep employee records aligned with organizational structures.

  • Enable clean, audit-ready data for downstream processes like reporting, payroll, and workflows.

When configured correctly using business rules and one-way sync, it transforms how your HR operations function—bringing accuracy, efficiency, and confidence to every transaction.

Regards,

Mahnoor Naseem

SAP SuccessFactors Consultant

If you found this blog a useful please consider giving it a Kudos

entry.title: Re: Historical Balances Migration in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition

entry.title: Re: send mail delayed
entry.content:
You could try the following but you'd also have to put in work to generate the timestamp for a future date/time and the domain definition suggests UTC.  Please note that I believe the normal way would be to call the SEND_SCREEN method which appears to allow a user to input such information.

  DATA: email    TYPE REF TO cl_bcs,
        exc      TYPE REF TO cx_bcs.

* Generate one in the future for true delay
  GET TIME STAMP FIELD DATA(timestamp).

  TRY.
*   Generate send request
    email = cl_bcs=>create_persistent( ).
    email->send_request->set_send_at( timestamp ).

*   Create and set document
    ...

*   Create sender and recipient addresses
    ...

*   Send document
    DATA(sent) = email->send( ).
    IF sent IS NOT INITIAL.
      COMMIT WORK.
    ELSE.
      ROLLBACK WORK.
    ENDIF.

    CATCH cx_bcs INTO exc.
*     No email sent - do nothing here
  ENDTRY.

 

Regards,
Ryan Crosby

entry.title: Re: Unable to create notification in SAP Asset Manager
entry.content: Issued this couple times in different versions of SSAM. The problem in my case was in priorities of Notification type. So when you use M1 it is standard and there are records in table T356 for standard priority type PM assigned to M1 notification type. But when you try to use custom Notif Type you configure custom priority type that doesn`t have priorities in T356 and there is an issue. So do correct configuration adding priorities to your custom priority type and this should solve the problem. Hope it helps.

entry.title: Add custom order by coumns in Story report
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Please advice me on how to add custom sorting for multiple columns in a table-type chart in a story report.

For example, I  would like the result to be sorted by:
1. Id de usuario (lowest to highest)
2. Fecha (By date, oldest to newest)
3. Hora (By time, earliest to latest)

This way I can have each employee's first and last punches of each day in order.

When I try the sort option, it only allows me to specify the order of a column, by ascending or descending. I would like to know if it's possible to add an order for different columns similar to how it's done in Excel.

Could you use HTTP adapter instead of ODATA? I faced the similar issue a few years back and used HTTP adapter to mitigate the issue.

Priyanka

entry.title: Re: EDI Setup for Billing Document - S4 HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Asesh,

Thank you for the clarification and for sharing the details. Based on your message and the screenshot, the root cause of the issue is clear

“The system is missing an active Communication Arrangement for the Billing Document output via EDI”.

  • For pure EDI scenarios (Channel = EDI), the Template field in Output Parameter Determination is optional. You only assign a Template if a formatted output (example PDF) is required.
  • Your error message confirms that an active Communication Arrangement is required for the Billing Document output to be processed successfully.

what to do,

Maintain an active Communication Arrangement for EDI with scenario

  • SAP_COM_0440 – Sales Integration (Outbound)

Ensure your Output Parameter Determination settings include:

    • Output Type: BILLING_DOCUMENT
    • Channel: EDI
    • Receiver: Correctly maintained
    • Template: Can be left blank for standard EDI

Useful SAP Reference

  • Communication Arrangements – SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

Once the Communication Arrangement is properly maintained, the EDI output will trigger as expected.

Let me know if you need more support

With kind regards

Chuma

entry.title: Re: Error in help.sap.com for CPM Commercial Project Mana...
entry.content: My question is related to the fact that SAP describes in the help pages that there would be a node in the customizing that is called Master Data - Master Project. This is clearly not the case. Shouldnt SAP correct this?

entry.title: New Projects | Early Insights | Real Influence - SAP Customer Engagement Initiative Cycle 2-2025
entry.content:
We’re excited to share that the second cycle of the SAP Customer Engagement Initiative for 2025 is now live! This cycle features 53 new projects, offering SAP customers and partners the opportunity to get early insights into product developments and actively collaborate with SAP teams to help shape the future of SAP solutions.

🗓Registration is open until July 25, 2025

In a fast-changing business environment, being part of the conversation early can make a real difference. SAP Customer Engagement Initiative gives you the chance to work directly with SAP product managers and developers, offering your feedback on ideas, prototypes, and plans while they’re still in early stages.

To help you explore the available projects, we’ve compiled a detailed list for your convenience. Check out the full list here or follow the links below to discover the exciting opportunities:

ABAP

  • Custom CDS Views App User Experience Improvements

SAP Business Technology Platform

  • Apply your brand to SAP applications using the UI theme designer
  • Automation and AI in SAP Discovery Center
  • Building BTP Solutions effectively with AI-augmented Infrastructure as Code Generation
  • Enhancing the User Experience of SAP Continuous Integration and Delivery
  • Flexible Cost Allocations using SAP Profitability and Performance Management Cloud Universal Model
  • IT Financial Management Cost Allocation Module in SAP Profitability and Performance Management Cloud
  • Logging Feedback Day - SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry Runtime
  • Making your business future ready for Agentic AI - reimagining application development on BTP
  • Operational Transfer Pricing Optimization in SAP Profitability and Performance Management Cloud
  • SAP Build - Discovery Initiative
  • Strategic Planning Scenarios in SAP Profitability and Performance Management Cloud Universal Model
  • The Future of Autonomous Software Engineering (ASE) in the Enterprise Context
  • Using a Custom Theme Across SAP Platforms and Systems

SAP Concur

  • Concur Budget Voice: Customer Insights & Innovation
  • Investigation into a new ICS feature
  • SAP Business Data Cloud for Concur

Data & Analytics

  • Enhancing the SAP HANA Cloud and SAP Build Code Experience
  • SAP HANA Database Migration to SAP HANA Cloud (XSC,XSA,CAP)
  • The Gen AI Assistant in SAP HANA Cloud
  • Uplift modelling and causality analysis for SAP Analytics  Cloud

SAP S/4HANA Cloud

Finance & Risk

  • AI assisted creation of balance validation rules AND comment proposal
  • Financial Reporting according to IFRS18 in S4HANA Cloud
  • Financial Statements in the New Review Booklets Analytical Application

Cloud Delivery & Excellence

  • Potential Workforce Person Data Correction Tool
  • Test Data Variants–Driven Test Process Flow Control and Execution
  • Tool-Agnostic Test Automation from AI-Generated Process Variants for ERP Systems

Digital Supply Chain

  • Empowering Reliability: Data-Driven Maintenance Efficiency Analysis for Strategy Optimization
  • Freight Rate Management for transportation processes with a low to medium complexity
  • Reimagine Warehouse Management with Joule

Private Cloud

  • Best Practice for Inspection Checklists in SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud

Public Cloud

  • Actual Liquidity Analysis
  • AI Agent for Open Item Clearing
  • AI-powered chatbot (Joule) for Intelligent Margin Analysis
  • Assess and improve your Quote-to-Cash process with meaningful Business Health KPIs
  • Enhancing Payment Run Experience
  • Optimizing Partner Solution Support in the SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Ecosystem
  • Price Recommendation in S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition
  • Research: Payment Advice In Existing Business Process
  • Sales Contract Management - Artificial Intelligent Handling for Quantity/Value Consumption by Joule
  • SAP Business Suite: Agility and Innovation through seamless Integration and Harmonization

User Experience

  • AI-assisted error resolution and data entry for SAP Fiori apps
  • AI-assisted Smart Visualization of MyHome for To-Dos (situations)

Industries

  • Contract Manufacturing Organization Collaboration for CGT Supply Chains using SAP Business Network
  • Real-Time Treatment Scheduling Optimization for Cell and Gene Therapy Orchestration

SAP Integration Experience Feedback

  • Assisted Assessment of End-to-End Implementation based on SAP Ariba Buying and Invoicing
  • Contingent & SOW Procurement in SAP Fieldglass: A Hands-on Experience with GenAI Features
  • Hands-on System Experience of Cost Center Integration using SAP MDI service for Source to Pay
  • Hands-on System Experience of integrated Toolchain aiding Business Suite Transformation
  • Hands-on System Experience on the integrated Business Scenario “Travel to Reimburse”

Others

  • Auto discovery of SAP applications and extensions in SAP LeanIX
  • Planned Domain Model Extensibility Portal
  • Shape the future of using AI in Cloud ALM for Operations

Let’s shape the future together!

Innovation happens through collaboration. By participating in the SAP Customer Engagement Initiative projects, you help SAP create better, more relevant solutions for businesses like yours. This is your chance to influence what comes next.

Don’t miss out – sign up today at influence.sap.com and be a part of the SAP Customer Engagement Initiative Cycle 2 in 2025!

Warm regards, 
Your SAP Customer Engagement Initiative Team 

Follow-up after registration: When you register for a project, you will be invited to an introductory call with the SAP project lead. At this point further participation is optional. Typically, all activities are governed by the Feedback Agreement with SAP.

Suresh

entry.title: SAP Intraday Statement - Posting (Version 2023)
entry.content:
We have Configured the Statement for Intraday to allow Postings. We are on Version 2023 so should allow posting but only have the Basic Scope Treasury. We have configured but no posting is generated, it does upload successfully but just gives the Book Status but does not update the  Processing Category.

Does FEBAN except values from intraday Statement Posting.

entry.title: Re: Why I cannot find the project template when I create...
entry.content: Like MArcio pointed out it looks like you created a Checklist Template and not a Project Template. The Project Template has Phases and Tasks, etc. Please show the details on the template you created.

entry.title: Re: Transport Request import ended with RC=8, But able to...
entry.content:
hi, check this SAP Note 2453216 - Change Request Management Selective Import and Status Dependent Configuration - Solution Manage.

Also in SPRO you can set consistency checks (Import*). there are few for different systems and set user status at cancellation. 

 

kind regards,

Gopal

entry.title: Re: XML to EDI conversion issue
entry.content: I am also getting the same error. Did you get a solution for this? Please let me know if yes. Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Project System work in progress accrued income
entry.content:
A couple of points:

1. To accrue WIP you should be doing T&M Billing using RRB.  The RA method you show is 3 which is Cost Based POC.  For T&M billing the RA methods are 14 or 15.  With these RA will accrue revenue for unbilled incurred costs.  When you run RA it looks like RRB.

2. In the RA run you showed you have already invoiced 6M which is your total planned revenue and posted 100% of your planned costs.  So there is nothing left to accrue.

3.  If you do want Cost Based POC then try another test project but don't invoice anything or just partial.  And incur some costs just not all of the plan to see how it works.

entry.content:

Could you please let me know if SAP has added integration  features  on  PLM software (Windchill) with SAP Grow with SAP-Public cloud as one of my client is looking for this integration functionality with Grow with SAP.

Thanks

Hariharan

Kind regards
Margit

Srinivas V

entry.title: Re: CPI: Error message using XML to EDI Converter
entry.content: Hello I am also getting the error when convert using XML to EDI converter in IS: "com.sap.it.rt.adapter.http.api.exception.HttpResponseException: An internal server error occured: Invalid Payload: XML TO EDI CONVERSION cannot process the payload". Can you please let me know the details , if this was resolved?

entry.title: Microsoft AutoGen v0.6.1 with SAP AI Core
entry.content:
Introduction

As a part of Intelligent Product Recommendation team we are collaborating with Microsoft to use Autogen for agentic usecases. I initially came across a helpful post AutoGen with SAP AI Core by @lars_gregori , which explores the integration of autogen using pyautogen and llm_config. However, use of llm_config is deprecated in v0.6.1 of AutoGen.  This blog will guide you how to integrate AutoGen  with SAP AI Core with the help of  AzureOpenAIChatCompletionClient .

Background

Currently, IPR product is already using python generative-ai-hub-sdk to call the LLM which takes in the 'AI-Resource-Group' as the required header and the model name. Now we have came accross a critical business usecase that requires the use of Autogen to implement the reflection pattern, which led me to explore OpenAIChatCompletionClient class of Autogen library.

I tried using OpenAIChatCompletionClient by passing base_url and token which returned 404 resource not found, since all SAP AI Core requests redirect to Azure OpenAI platform that requires api_version as  a mandatory query parameter. But OpenAIChatCompletionClient class doesn't provides api_version to the LLM while calling it. After further deep dive I figured out AzureOpenAIChatCompletionClient, which allows requests to be redirected successfully via SAP AI Core to Azure OpenAI by passing the api_version.

Reason to use AzureOpenAIChatCompletionClient

  • OpenAIChatCompletionClient cannot be used directly.

  • Instead, we need:

    • base_url: The model deployment URL from SAP AI Core.

    • api_key: A bearer token from GenAI Hub (via SAP AI Core).

    • api_version: Required by Azure for all chat completions.

    • Additional headers like AI-Resource-Group.

Code Sample

Below code sample shows how we can get deployment url and auth token using generative-ai-hub-sdk, that can be passed to AzueOpenAIChatCompletionClient along with api_version.

from autogen_agentchat.agents import AssistantAgent
from autogen_ext.models.openai import AzureOpenAIChatCompletionClient
from autogen_core.models import ModelFamily
from gen_ai_hub.proxy import GenAIHubProxyClient
from ai_core_sdk.ai_core_v2_client import AICoreV2Client
from autogen_agentchat.ui import Console
import asyncio

# Fetch deployment URL from SAP AI Core
def get_deployment_url():
    try:
        ai_core_client = AICoreV2Client.from_env()
        resources = ai_core_client.deployment.query(resource_group="default", scenario_id="foundation-models").resources
        return resources[0].deployment_url if resources else None
    except Exception:
        return None

# Fetch token and prepare model client
base_url = get_deployment_url()
gen_ai_hub_proxy_client = GenAIHubProxyClient(resource_group='default')
token = gen_ai_hub_proxy_client.get_ai_core_token().replace("Bearer ", "")

model_client = AzureOpenAIChatCompletionClient(
    model="gpt-4.1",
    base_url=base_url,
    api_key=token,
    default_headers={'AI-Resource-Group': 'default'},
    model_info={
        "family": ModelFamily.GPT_41,
        "vision": False,
        "function_calling": True,
        "json_output": False
    },
    api_version="2023-05-15" // api_version as per SAP AI Core documentation
)

# Tool example
async def get_weather(city: str) -> str:
    return f"The weather in {city} is 73 degrees and Sunny."

# Define the agent
agent = AssistantAgent(
    name="weather_agent",
    model_client=model_client,
    tools=[get_weather],
    system_message="You are a weather assistant. Give complete details about the weather in the city requested by the user."
)

# Run the agent
async def main() -> None:
    await Console(agent.run_stream(task="What is the weather in New York?"))
    await model_client.close()

asyncio.run(main())

Conclusion

Above example is referred from Autogen documentation. For api_version, ChatCompletionClient can be referred from SAP AI Core documentation.  Output from above code:

---------- TextMessage (user) ----------
What is the weather in New York?
---------- ToolCallRequestEvent (weather_agent) ----------
[FunctionCall(id='call_WJfl63g7skHT3dWnxMCwNtCr', arguments='{"city":"New York"}', name='get_weather')]
---------- ToolCallExecutionEvent (weather_agent) ----------
[FunctionExecutionResult(content='The weather in New York is 73 degrees and Sunny.', name='get_weather', call_id='call_WJfl63g7skHT3dWnxMCwNtCr', is_error=False)]
---------- ToolCallSummaryMessage (weather_agent) ----------
The weather in New York is 73 degrees and Sunny.

I hope this post helps other teams building solutions on SAP AI Core to successfully integrate newer versions of AutoGen to call the LLM and build multiple AI agents.

Elevate with AI !!

entry.title: Re: Display Document With General Ledger View in FB03/FB03L
entry.content: Hi Experts, I have added custom fields, and they are available in both the ACDOCA and BSEG tables. After posting a G/L document using BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST, the values are correctly updated in these table fields, and everything works fine in the Development system. However, after moving the changes to the QA system, I noticed that in FB03, the Entry View shows the custom fields and their values correctly. But in the General Ledger View, the fields appear empty or blank. Is there any solution for this issue? Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: How to Reterive back standard DPC_Ext class after deleting accidently.
entry.content: SE01 or SE10 to create a transport request, choose transport of copies, choose a target virtual system (no real system), then SE80 choose the class, context menu Utilities > Write transport entry, release the TR, copy the data/cofile files of the transport request and import in the DEV system. It has been already asked and answered, so check the forum for more information.

entry.title: Re: SAP TechEd 2025: Registration is live – check out our brand new hybrid experience!
entry.content: @josh_bentley I just emailed you about 2 upcoming ASUG MId Atlantic events.  I hope you can make it!

Please explain these steps in detail.

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud - QRC3 Snowflake Key-Pair Authentication Update, New Data Sources
entry.content:
Update Overview

QRC3 brings a few important updates in SAP Analytics Cloud in the Connectivity area.

  • Support for Snowflake Key-Pair authentication
  • Support for Oracle Exadata 19c, Oracle 19c, Oracle 20c, PostgreSQL 14 and PostgreSQL15
    • The new versions of the data sources will be supported

Who should read this article?

  • SAP Analytics Cloud Administrators who manage the connectivity to SAC
  • If you have been using Generic JDBC to import from Oracle or PostgreSQL
  • If you are using the existing Snowflake connection with username and password

Snowflake Key-Pair Authentication More Details

Snowflake is blocking single factor authentication November 2025 (https://www.snowflake.com/en/blog/blocking-single-factor-password-authentification/). This means that SAP Analytics Cloud Import Connections using username and password would fail. 

What do I need to do?

Step 1) Configure Snowflake Key-Pair Authentication

For a more steps from Snowflake, go here

  1. Generate Private Key
    1. Open a Terminal window
    2. You can generate an encrypted or unencrypted private key 

      unencrypted:
      openssl genrsa 2048 | openssl pkcs8 -topk8 -inform PEM -out rsa_key.p8 -nocrypt
      encrypted: 
      openssl genrsa 2048 | openssl pkcs8 -topk8 -v2 des3 -inform PEM -out rsa_key.p8

      These commands will generate a file in PEM format:

      -----BEGIN ENCRYPTED PRIVATE KEY-----
MIIE6T...
-----END ENCRYPTED PRIVATE KEY-----
    3. This file should be saved into the SAC Agent > Tomcat directory. For example, it can be saved into  the .../tomcat/webapps/ directory
  2. Generate Public Key

    1. In the Terminal Window, generate the public key based on the private key above

      openssl rsa -in rsa_key.p8 -pubout -out rsa_key.pub
    2. The command will generate a public key in PEM format

      -----BEGIN PUBLIC KEY-----
MIIBIj...
-----END PUBLIC KEY-----
  3. Assign Public Key to Snowflake User
    1. In Snowflake, run the following command to assign the public key to a Snowflake user. This snowflake user that imports the data from SAC.

      ** Note:
      - You must have MODIFY PROGRAMMATIC AUTHENTICATION METHODS or OWNERSHIP privileges on the user. or SECURITYADMIN role or higher.. 
      - copy the full public key from the rsa_key.pub file **

      ALTER USER example_user SET RSA_PUBLIC_KEY='MIIBIjANBgkqh...';

 

Step 2) Restart SAC Agent
Step 3) Create / Update a Snowflake Connection
  1.  Go to Connections > SQL Databases 

     

  2. Select the SAC Agent location and the Snowflake Connection Type. For instructions on setting up the JDBC drivers, go here: 
  3. Configure the Snowflake connection

    Note: The major change in QRC3 is we are accepting the private_key_file parameter in this input parameter. This will reflect the location of the private key stored on the SAC Agent (deployed on Tomcat) resides. 


  4. For the Username, please use the same Snowflake user that he public key is associated with in the previous section.

    The passphrase area is used ONLY if you are using an encrypted private key. If you are not using an encrypted private key, you can leave this blank. 

  5. Save this connection.
  6. You are done!

Please note if you are modifying an existing connection, you will have to edit the existing connection, modify and resave. 

Feel free to send me a DM if you have any specific questions

Thank you all for your time and have a great day! 

Best Regards,
Jimmy

 

 

 

 

Q&A

entry.title: Basic CAP Java CF deployment with IAS
CAN'T EDIT BANK STATEMENT
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have an issue when I create Bank Statement via Web Service (ManageBankStatementIn ).

I have created a Bank Statement via WS in status "In Preparation", but when I go to EDIT the Bank Statement I can't EDIT. I need to EDIT the Bank Statement after I create it via WS because it needs additional information, like add positions. I attached a screen shot of the instance that i can't edit. Hope you can help me.

Best regards,



------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: CAN'T EDIT BANK STATEMENT
entry.content:
Dear All,

When the bank statement is created via web service, it is only possible to edit/update the below fields:

  • Validity Year

  • Posting Date

  • Document Description

  • Closing Balance Amount

  • Total Credit Amount

  • Total Debit Amount

  • Items Total Number Value

Refer to the below Help Documentation (Section: Update scenario) for additional details, please.

https://help.sap.com/doc/a2b4c7ef61d64397b2b1d052082a8a08/2505/en-US/PSM_ISI_R_II_FOP_MANAGE_BANK_STMNT_IN.html

Regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: FSCM CLM: API to update Cash Flow Analyzer (FQM table)
entry.content:
Hi experts, 

I have a client who demands to update cash flow with external data from the legacy system.

I tested API CASHFLOW_IN but it is returning error: II_FQM_ESR_CASH_FLOW_IN is not proxy class.  It seems that proxy is obsolete.  I'm not sure if this API can be used in the Cloud private edition or only in the public edition.   I the service catalog it is active.  

I suggested using memo record upload functionality but the cliente did not agree.

Thanks in advance.  Any help will be great.

Best Regards

RL

entry.title: Re: Governance membership "admin" excludes "collaborator"...
entry.content:
Hi,

It is not clear to me if you want to create a process in Process Governance or in Process Manager.

In case you want to create one in Process Governance it should work out of the box as admin. In case not please open a ticket as it is not the expected behaviour.

In case it is Process Manager please reply to this thread so another colleague can answer.

Best,

Adriana

entry.title: Re: Planned Integration of TM and WM (5HP/1P9/BME + 3BS)...
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

The Advanced intercompany stock transfer (5HP) with warehouse management and transportation management (outbound) is currently not available as mentioned previously. 

But the Stock Transport Orders with Outbound Warehouse Processing is currently available on our systems. 

This supports the scope item Stock Transfer with Delivery (BME) with scope item Warehouse Outbound Processing (3BS).

For further information, please check the documents below:

Enablement of Stock Transport Orders with Outbound Warehouse Processing

Integration of Stock Transport Orders

Best regards,

Geovana

entry.title: Intermittent Initial Load Slowness for Random T-Codes Affecting Random Users
entry.content:
Dear SAP BASIS/HANA Experts,

In our S/4 HANA production environment, we are encountering intermittent initial load slowness for various transaction codes (T-codes), affecting different users on a random basis. The issue occurs when a user executes a T-code for the first time during the day. Subsequent executions generally respond promptly. However, the issue may reoccur for the same or different users with different T-codes on the following days.

Our observations and findings are as follows:

  • The behavior is unpredictable, affecting random users and random T-codes.

  • The slowness is temporary, typically lasting 30–40 seconds, occasionally up to 1–2 minutes.

  • By the time the issue is reported, it has usually resolved, making it difficult to activate traces or collect dumps.

  • Analysis of STAD data reveals very high DB request times (sequential reads) during slowness against the affected user.

  • Affected users appear to be stuck in the “DYNPLOAD” action, as observed in SM50.

  • Program, screen buffer, table buffer parameters value are sufficient in ST02, No SWAP.

System Environment:

  • Standard architecture: S/4 application and HANA database hosted on the same server

  • Total RAM: 2 TB

  • HANA Memory Allocation Limit: 1600 GB

  • SAP Application Memory: 180 GB

  • Recent upgrade from 1.5 TB to 2 TB RAM completed prior to issue onset

We would appreciate your inputs and recommendations on how best to diagnose and address this behavior, particularly given the inconsistency and unpredictable nature of the symptoms.

Looking forward to your expert guidance.

entry.title: Actions - via PA30 - Values not transferred to Org. Assignment screen
entry.content:
Hello Friends,

I try to execute actions via PA40. Entered Action, reason, PA, PSA etc and action gets saved. But when action completes Infotype 0000 and moving to 0001, the values entered in 0000 screen (Company code, PA) are not passed into 0001(Org. assignment screen).  And those fields are disabled. As Personnel are field is not passed from previous screen and disabled, could not save IT0001. 

Please provide the possible reasons why IT0001 values are not passed from Actions to Org. assignment screen. 

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Intermittent Initial Load Slowness for Random T-Codes Affecting Random Users
entry.content: I would check the CUA and Screen buffers in ST02, and if you are facing problems then a review of program buffers and others wouldn't hurt.

entry.title: Re: SLD does not update the company list even though the...
entry.content:
Dear nidhisingh14,

Thank you very much for your response and support.

This is what my SAP partner responded in two separate conversations (separated by dotted lines):

------------------------------------------------

Lola León

Dear Ricardo, good morning,

What you suggest can be done; however, doing so would mean being left without SAP and having to reconnect or reinstall the add-ons.

We can proceed with your confirmation and under your responsibility, since, as previously communicated, we do not have the installers to ensure a recovery point, nor could we download a new license package.

Best regards.

--------------------------------------------------

Jacinto Pastor

Hi Ricardo, as Lola mentioned, the process you indicated was not carried out because we do not have a guaranteed rollback point.

Removing the registration of the main SAP service from the SLD portal means that the SAP client will not be able to complete the connection while the removal and re-registration process is taking place.

Additionally, while this does not result in the loss of users or licenses (since the hardware key does not change), it does affect the operational continuity of services during the removal and re-registration of the SLD.

Because we do not have a guaranteed rollback point, performing this test under these conditions exceeds what is considered best practice. That is why it has not been executed. To ensure proper service, an update scenario was suggested instead, since we do have SAP and add-on installers available in that case.

I hope this helps clarify the scope of what Lola mentioned.

Best regards.

-------------------------------

Could you please confirm whether their explanation is accurate or if it’s safe to proceed with removing and re-registering the server in the SLD?

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: Parallel Line Branch via SAP for ME
entry.content: This is exactly what I was looking for,  thanks.

entry.title: Re: Intermittent Initial Load Slowness for Random T-Codes Affecting Random Users
entry.content: CUA & Screen buffers in ST02 is looking fine, zero swapping.
